title: VeryLegacyZoomer
description: A zoomer for very legacy versions
body:
# Introduction
A Zoomer Mod for very legacy versions (1.6.4 / 1.7.10).

# Configuration
(1.6.4 version of the mod for example)

.minecraft/config/vlzoomer.cfg
```
settings {
    # (HOLD MODE ONLY) Fov modifier when the zoom key is pressed.
    D:holdFovModifier=0.125

    # (TOGGLE MODE ONLY) Fov modifier when the zoom key is pressed once
    D:toggleFovModifier1=0.5

    # (TOGGLE MODE ONLY) Fov modifier when the zoom key is pressed twice
    D:toggleFovModifier2=0.125

    # false: HOLD MODE, true: TOGGLE MODE
    B:toggleMode=false
}
```
# KeyBindings
Zoom Key (Default: Z);
Zoom Mode Switch Key (Default: X).

# ATTENTION
You **DEFINITELY CAN** add the mod to your modpack.
